_source: Core Rules pp.72-75 — World Traits Table (D100)
_note: Roll D100 on new world arrival. Visibility restrictions rolled at start of each campaign turn. If scenario adds second visibility restriction, use shortest.
_optional_rule: Wild Galaxy: Roll twice per world. If results contradict, ignore second roll.

world_traits.name: Haze
world_traits.description: During battle, visibility is reduced to 1D6+8".

world_traits.name: Overgrown
world_traits.description: When setting up the table, you must add 1D6+2 individual plant features or 1D3 areas of vegetation (roughly 3-5" across).

world_traits.name: Warzone
world_traits.description: When setting up the table, you must add 1D3 ruined buildings or craters to the table.

world_traits.name: Heavily Enforced
world_traits.description: When fighting opponents from the Criminal Elements Encounter Table, the number encountered is reduced by 1. When rolling to see if they become Rivals, only roll a single die as normal.

world_traits.name: Rampant Crime
world_traits.description: When fighting opponents from the Criminal Elements encounter list, add 1 to the number encountered.

world_traits.name: Invasion Risk
world_traits.description: Add +1 to all Invasion rolls.

world_traits.name: Imminent Invasion
world_traits.description: Add +2 to all Invasion rolls and if the world is invaded, rolls for war progress are at -1.

world_traits.name: Lacks Starship Facilities
world_traits.description: You cannot spend more than 3 credits per campaign turn on starship Repairs.

world_traits.name: Easy Recruiting
world_traits.description: Add +1 to the roll when Recruiting.

world_traits.name: Medical Science
world_traits.description: The cost for accelerated medical care is only 3 credits per character.

world_traits.name: Technical Knowledge
world_traits.description: Add +1 to all Repair attempts.

world_traits.name: Opportunities
world_traits.description: Add +1 to the roll when searching for Patrons.

world_traits.name: Booming Economy
world_traits.description: When rolling for post-battle credit rewards, any 1 on the dice is rerolled until it shows a score other than 1.

world_traits.name: Busy Markets
world_traits.description: Each campaign turn, you may spend 2 credits once to roll on the Trade Table (p.79).

world_traits.name: Bureaucratic Mess
world_traits.description: When attempting to leave, you must roll 2D6. On a 2-4, you are delayed and cannot leave this campaign turn without a bribe equal to the roll in credits. You may try again next campaign turn.

world_traits.name: Restricted Education
world_traits.description: You must roll 6+ to be approved for Advanced Training on this world.

world_traits.name: Expensive Education
world_traits.description: The fee to enroll in Advanced Training is 3 credits.

world_traits.name: Travel Restricted
world_traits.description: No more than one crew member may take the Explore option each campaign turn.

world_traits.name: Unity Safe Sector
world_traits.description: The world cannot be Invaded.

world_traits.name: Gloom
world_traits.description: In battle, maximum visibility is restricted to 1D6+6".

world_traits.name: Bot Manufacturing
world_traits.description: All Bot upgrades are 1 credit cheaper.

world_traits.name: Fuel Refinery
world_traits.description: Traveling from this world costs only 3 credits.

world_traits.name: Alien Species Restricted
world_traits.description: Roll 1D10 to determine restricted species: 1=Engineer, 2-4=K'Erin, 5=Soulless, 6=Precursor, 7-9=Feral, 10=Swift. Characters of this type cannot be hired here (count as baseline Humans instead), and cannot undertake any crew jobs. They may participate in combat normally.

world_traits.name: Weapon Licensing
world_traits.description: Any weapon obtained through the Trade Table or purchased outright costs +1 credit.

world_traits.name: Import Restrictions
world_traits.description: You cannot sell any items on this world.

world_traits.name: Military Outpost
world_traits.description: Add +2 to Invasion rolls. Add +2 when checking for war progress.

world_traits.name: Dangerous
world_traits.description: When rolling on the Roving Threats Encounter Table, increase the number of opponents by +1.

world_traits.name: Shipyards
world_traits.description: The cost of all Ship Components is reduced by 2 credits.

world_traits.name: Barren
world_traits.description: No plant features can be used on the battlefield.

world_traits.name: Vendetta System
world_traits.description: Opponents become your Rivals on a roll of 1 or 2.

world_traits.name: Free Trade Zone
world_traits.description: One crew member per campaign turn can roll twice when using the Trade Table, and choose either result.

world_traits.name: Corporate State
world_traits.description: +2 when rolling to find a Patron. Patrons are always Corporations. Failing a mission means being blacklisted and you cannot get Patrons here again.

world_traits.name: Adventurous Population
world_traits.description: When successfully Recruiting, you may roll up one additional character and then choose who to hire.

world_traits.name: Frozen
world_traits.description: Any character making a Dash may opt to slide. They move 1D6" in a straight line, and must move the full distance. If they collide with anything, they — and any character they collide with — are knocked 1" in a random direction and become Stunned.

world_traits.name: Flat
world_traits.description: Do not place any hills or raised ground on the battlefield.

world_traits.name: Fuel Shortage
world_traits.description: The cost to travel from this world is raised by 1D3 credits. You may roll each campaign turn.

world_traits.name: Reflective Dust
world_traits.description: All Laser, Beam, or Blast weapons are -1 to Hit at ranges exceeding 9".

world_traits.name: High Cost
world_traits.description: Your crew size counts as being 2 higher for the purpose of Upkeep costs.

world_traits.name: Interdiction
world_traits.description: You are only approved to stay for 1D3 campaign turns. To extend your stay, you must obtain a license. Roll 2D6, requiring an 8+.

world_traits.name: Null Zone
world_traits.description: No teleportation device of any type works.

world_traits.name: Crystals
world_traits.description: Place 2D6 crystals on the battlefield. If you don't have any, use rocks.

world_traits.name: Fog
world_traits.description: All shots beyond 8" are -1 to Hit.
